titleStmt.title: SII 22.22: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 22. (A.R. No. 22 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME BASE. RĀJARĀJA I—14th YEAR. (A.D. 998)

summary.p: The short introduction lists only the victories of the king over the enemy's ships at Śālai and his conquests of Gaṅgapāḍi, Nuḷambapāḍi, Taḍigaivaḻi and Vēṅgai-nāḍu. The inscription records an endowment of lands wet and dry in Kīḻūr village to the temple of Kālakāladēva by one Dīran Kūttaṉ alias Ādichchapanma-Viḻupparaiyaṉ for the daily supply of 4 nāḻi of milk, evidently for the sacred bath of the deity, for burning a perpetual lamp and for the akkāraḍalai offering to the god on the days of Saṅkrānti. Among the boundaries of the land mention is made of a field (?) called Varaguṇa-viḷāgam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . cālai kala maṟuttu keṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampapāṭiyum taṭikai
vaḻiyum veṅkaiñāṭum koṇṭa śrī korāja rājakesarivanmakku yāṇṭu 10 4- lāvatu muḻaiyūrnā
ṭṭu paṟṟatil tevumuḻāṉ Uṭaiyāruṭaṉ vanta paḻaiya parivāraṟil tiraṉ kūttaṉāṉa Āticcapaṉma viḻupparaiya
ṉeṉ Amparnāṭṭu paṭaiyeviya tirukkaṭavūr śrīkālakālatevarkku nicatam pāl nānāḻiyāl nellu
patināḻiyum non=tāviḷakku Oṉṟukkum saṅgrāntimālai Akkāra ṭalaikku nellu nāṟṟūṇi
kkum nivaṉtamāṉa nilam maṉṟāṭu tiṭṭai kiḻūr nilattukkellai Ūrellaikku kaḻikku
vaṭakku varakuṇaviḷākattu kiḻkulaikkuk kiḻakku Ikkulai vaṭakku nokkic ceṉṟu toṭṭam I
ttoṭṭattiṉ melaikkuḷattuppātikkuk kiḻakkum Ūrellaikku teṟ kum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam nirnilamu
m puṉceyyum toṭṭamum Iḷamaṉaiyum kuḷattuppātiyum Iṉnāṉ kellaiyuḷḷu makappaṭṭatel
lām caṉtirātitavaṟ niṟka Itu paṉmāheśvararakṣai
Digital edition of SII 22.22 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
